name: queue
description: Prompt queue — store prompts for later consumption by USERINPUT

list.description: List all queued prompts with indices

add.description: Add a text prompt to the end of the queue

delete.description: Remove a prompt by its index

args.name: ID
args.help: Zero-based index of the prompt to delete

gui.description: Open the visual queue editor (drag-to-reorder, add, edit, delete)

move-up.description: Move a prompt one position up

move-down.description: Move a prompt one position down

move-to-top.description: Move a prompt to the top

move-to-bottom.description: Move a prompt to the bottom
